info.name: Class Up API v1
info.description: Complete API collection for Class Up - Educational Management System with Stripe Subscriptions

request.description: Authenticate user and get access token
Get all invoices for the subscription
Create a Stripe checkout session for subscription
Retrieve a specific student by ID
Retrieve a specific class by ID
Retrieve a specific classroom by ID
Retrieve a specific subject by ID
Retrieve a specific guardian by ID
Enroll a student in a class
Retrieve a specific enrollment by ID
Retrieve a specific attendance record by ID
Retrieve a specific grade by ID
Create a new certificate for a student
Retrieve a specific certificate by ID
Retrieve a specific certificate template by ID
Get student growth analytics and statistics
Webhook endpoint for Stripe events (automatically called by Stripe)
Create a new school payment plan
Get a specific school payment plan
List all student payment plan associations
Associate a student with a payment plan
Get a specific student payment plan association
Update a student payment plan association
Remove a student from a payment plan
List payments. Supports filters: status (pending|paid|late|canceled), student_id, from_date, to_date

body.raw:
{
  "description": "Student tuition payment",
  "amount": 5000.00,
  "category": "Tuition",
  "date": "2024-03-29",
  "payment_method": "Bank Transfer",
  "received_from": "John Doe",
  "status": "received",
  "notes": "Monthly tuition for March"
}
